Class StructureUtil

java.lang.Object
xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.StructureUtil
public class StructureUtil extends Object
a System for all processes needed aligning and placing structures. Works with both custom and vanilla structures. Custom structures work via loading world edit schematics and aligning to corners of a chunk before pasting.

  • Constructor Details

    • StructureUtil

      public StructureUtil()

  • Method Details

    • getBottomRightOffset

      public static com.sk89q.worldedit.math.Vector3 getBottomRightOffset(com.sk89q.worldedit.extent.clipboard.Clipboard clipboard, int rotation)
      Calculates the offset needed to align a clipboard to the bottom-right corner of a chunk (16x16). Bottom-right is considered (+X, +Z) / South-East corner.
      Parameters:
      clipboard - The clipboard to evaluate.
      rotation - The rotation that will be applied (0, 90, 180, 270).
      Returns:
      A vector representing the X and Z translation needed.

    • getCenteringOffset

      public static com.sk89q.worldedit.math.Vector3 getCenteringOffset(com.sk89q.worldedit.extent.clipboard.Clipboard clipboard)
      Calculates the offset needed to center a clipboard within a chunk. Assumes the target is a 16x16 area centered at (8.0, 8.0) relative to the paste location.
      Parameters:
      clipboard - The clipboard to evaluate.
      Returns:
      A vector representing the X and Z translation needed.

    • getDimensions

      public static com.sk89q.worldedit.math.BlockVector3 getDimensions(com.sk89q.worldedit.extent.clipboard.Clipboard clipboard)
      Gets the dimensions (width, height, length) of a WorldEdit clipboard.
      Parameters:
      clipboard - The clipboard.
      Returns:
      A BlockVector3 representing the size.

    • getOffset

      public static com.sk89q.worldedit.math.BlockVector3 getOffset(com.sk89q.worldedit.extent.clipboard.Clipboard clipboard)
      Gets the offset of the clipboard relative to its origin.
      Parameters:
      clipboard - The clipboard.
      Returns:
      The offset.

    • clearAbove

      public static void clearAbove(org.bukkit.World world, int minX, int minZ, int maxX, int maxZ, int startY)
      Clears blocks above a certain height in a given area.
      Parameters:
      world - The world.
      minX - Minimum X.
      minZ - Minimum Z.
      maxX - Maximum X.
      maxZ - Maximum Z.
      startY - Starting Y (inclusive).

    • fillBelow

      public static void fillBelow(org.bukkit.World world, int minX, int minZ, int maxX, int maxZ, int startY, org.bukkit.Material material)
      Fills blocks below a certain height with a specified material.
      Parameters:
      world - The world.
      minX - Minimum X.
      minZ - Minimum Z.
      maxX - Maximum X.
      maxZ - Maximum Z.
      startY - Starting Y (exclusive, fills from startY - 1 downwards).
      material - The material to fill with.

    • loadSchematicFromResource

      public static com.sk89q.worldedit.extent.clipboard.Clipboard loadSchematicFromResource(String resourcePath)
      Loads a WorldEdit clipboard from a resource bundled in the JAR.
      Parameters:
      resourcePath - Path to the resource (e.g., "ritual.schem")
      Returns:
      The loaded clipboard, or null if loading failed.

    • spawnSchematic

      public static com.sk89q.worldedit.EditSession spawnSchematic(com.sk89q.worldedit.extent.clipboard.Clipboard clipboard, org.bukkit.Location location)
      Pastes a WorldEdit clipboard at the specified location.
      Parameters:
      clipboard - The clipboard to paste.
      location - The location to paste at.
      Returns:
      The EditSession used for pasting, for undo purposes.

    • loadVanillaStructureFromResource

      public static org.bukkit.structure.Structure loadVanillaStructureFromResource(String resourcePath)
      Loads a vanilla Minecraft structure from a resource bundled in the JAR.
      Parameters:
      resourcePath - Path to the .nbt structure file.
      Returns:
      The loaded structure, or null if loading failed.

    • spawnVanillaStructureFromResource

      public static void spawnVanillaStructureFromResource(String resourcePath, org.bukkit.Location location)
      Loads and spawns a vanilla Minecraft structure from a resource bundled in the JAR.
      Parameters:
      resourcePath - Path to the .nbt structure file.
      location - The location to spawn the structure at.

    • getSchemMaterials

      public static List<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack> getSchemMaterials(File schemFile)
      Reads a schematic file and extracts all materials/blocks as an ItemStack list. ItemStacks are ordered by material type name alphabetically.
      Parameters:
      schemFile - The .schem file to read.
      Returns:
      A list of ItemStacks representing all unique materials in the schematic, ordered by material type. Returns an empty list if the file cannot be read.

    • getSchemMaterialsFromResource

      public static List<org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack> getSchemMaterialsFromResource(String resourcePath)
      Reads a schematic from a resource in the JAR and extracts all materials as ItemStacks. ItemStacks are ordered by material type name alphabetically.
      Parameters:
      resourcePath - Path to the resource (e.g., "ritual.schem")
      Returns:
      A list of ItemStacks representing all unique materials in the schematic, ordered by material type. Returns an empty list if loading fails.
